results.evidence: init.ts:370-372 — for repos.length <= FOREGROUND_CLONE_THRESHOLD, calls runForegroundClone() which uses the job-compatible repo format. Functionally equivalent to launchCloneJob({ foreground: true }) but inlined for simplicity.
init.ts:372 — await runForegroundClone() blocks init until all repos cloned
repo-connect.ts runForegroundClone() line: console.log(chalk.gray('Cloning {owner}/{name}...')) + success/failure report

repo-connect.ts mapParsedReposToCloneOptions() maps { org, name, cloneUrl } to { owner: org, name, path: 'repositories/{org}/{name}', cloneUrl }. Tests in repo-connect.test.ts verify multi-org and empty cases.

init.ts no longer imports or calls cloneReposIntoWorkspace. Import replaced with mapParsedReposToCloneOptions, runForegroundClone, FOREGROUND_CLONE_THRESHOLD. execFileNoThrowSync still imported for git-init (not cloning).

init.ts:378 — scanUmbrellaRepos still called for foreground path (needed since runForegroundClone doesn't register repos). For background path, scanUmbrellaRepos is NOT called. This is a justified deviation from the AC — the AC assumed clone-worker runs for both modes, but foreground uses inline cloning.
init.ts:381 — launchCloneJob() called without foreground flag for repos.length > FOREGROUND_CLONE_THRESHOLD
init.ts:381-388 — after launchCloneJob, init prints job info and continues (no await on clone completion)
init.ts:385-387 — prints job ID, 'Monitor: specweave jobs', and 'Repos will appear in repositories/ as they complete'
init.ts:454-456 — umbrella.enabled always set to true (with empty childRepos if no discovery). Clone worker populates childRepos on completion.
launchCloneJob() without foreground flag spawns clone-worker.ts via detached process (job-launcher.ts:353)
mapParsedReposToCloneOptions() produces path='repositories/{org}/{name}' for all repos regardless of count. Verified in test: 'should map ParsedRepo fields to CloneLaunchOptions repo format'
init.ts:370 — 1 repo <= FOREGROUND_CLONE_THRESHOLD (3), so foreground path executes
init.ts:454-456 — config.umbrella.enabled always set to true. scanUmbrellaRepos at line 378 discovers the cloned repo and builds childRepos.
job-launcher.ts:286-297 — pre-flight checks all repos, if all exist returns { skippedPreFlight: true } without spawning worker
job-launcher.ts:273-283 — prints count + list of already-existing repos as 'skipped'
runForegroundClone continues on failure (no throw), returns totalFailed count. init.ts:374-376 prints warning but continues.
clone-worker.ts uses completeJobWithWarnings for partial failures (never sets status to 'failed')
mapParsedReposToCloneOptions test 'should handle multi-org repos' verifies org-a/frontend and org-b/backend map to separate paths

findings.title: Foreground path uses runForegroundClone instead of launchCloneJob({ foreground: true })
findings.issue: AC-US1-01 specifies calling launchCloneJob({ foreground: true }), but the implementation uses runForegroundClone() directly. This is a spec deviation — functionally equivalent but means two clone codepaths exist (runForegroundClone for init foreground, clone-worker for background/get).
findings.suggestion: Acceptable as-is. Consolidating to use launchCloneJob + inline worker execution would add complexity for marginal benefit. runForegroundClone is simpler and well-tested.
findings.impact: No production impact. Two clone implementations to maintain long-term.
